untranslatable_reason: Signal requires error-correction model (ECM) residuals from cointegration analysis and z-score calculations on spread divergence. These are multivariate statistical constructs requiring external model output (Johansen cointegration test, ECM residual series, spread normalization). The allowed indicator set contains only single-series technical indicators and does not include: (1) cointegration test results, (2) ECM residual values, (3) standardized spread z-scores, or (4) persistence counters across bars. Cannot be expressed using price, moving averages, RSI, ATR, Bollinger Bands, MACD, ADX, Stochastic, Donchian, Pivots, Volume ratios, or bar properties alone.
translation_notes: This is a pairs-trading signal requiring pre-computed statistical model outputs. To implement: (1) Execute Johansen cointegration test offline on the two cointegrated series, (2) Fit error-correction model and extract residuals, (3) Calculate z-scores of residuals with 3-bar persistence check, (4) Feed ECM residual z-scores into backtest engine as a custom data stream (similar to how external alpha factors are loaded). Entry would then require: ecm_zscore > 2.5 for 3+ bars AND volume confirmation. Exit: ecm_zscore crosses zero OR ecm_zscore > 3.5 (hard stop).
